hero.title: Ukusuka kwesidingo sokufinyeleleka kuya ku-repo yomphakathi
hero.lead: I-IATF isiza izinhlangano, amaqembu, nabantu ngabanye ukuba baguqule izidingo zangempela zokufinyeleleka zibe amaphrojekthi omthombo ovulekile womphakathi.
support: Amaphrojekthi amukelwe ashicilelwa enhlanganweni ye-IATF GitHub ngaphansi kwelayisense ye-copyleft futhi athuthukiswa esidlangalaleni ngunjiniyela ophethe.

paragraphs: Ngokusebenzisa ifomu, noma ubani angathumela inkinga yokufinyeleleka ku-IATF. Uma ithimba lingayithatha, kuvulwa indawo yokugcina yomphakathi ye-GitHub yomsebenzi.
Iphrojekthi ngayinye eyamukelekayo inekhaya lomphakathi elicacile lekhodi, izingqinamba, imibhalo, nokukhishwa, ngokuthuthukiswa okuholwa endaweni evulekile ngunjiniyela onomthwalo wemfanelo.

header.title: Isebenza kanjani
header.intro: Imodeli ihlala incane ngamabomu ukuze kube lula ukulandela indlela yomphakathi.

steps.title: Kungeniswa isidingo
paragraphs: Inhlangano, iqembu, noma umuntu ngamunye angafaka isicelo esisekelwe esidingweni sangempela sokufinyeleleka.
Izicelo zingaqala nge-website, nge-imeyili ku- contact@iatf.cc, noma ngeDiscord.

steps.title: I-IATF iyayibuyekeza
paragraphs: Sibuyekeza ukufaneleka komsebenzi, ububanzi obusebenzayo, nokuthi umsebenzi uwela yini kuphrojekthi yomthombo ovulekile womphakathi.

steps.title: Kusungulwa indawo yokugcina yomphakathi
paragraphs: Uma iphrojekthi yamukelwa, ishicilelwa enhlanganweni ye-IATF GitHub ngaphansi kwelayisense ye-copyleft.
Indawo yokugcina iba yikhaya lomphakathi lekhodi, izinkinga, imibhalo, nokukhishwa.

steps.title: Unjiniyela onomthwalo wemfanelo uhola iphrojekthi
paragraphs: Kunonjiniyela ophethe onikezwe indawo yokugcina iphrojekthi futhi ukuthuthukiswa kwenzeka esidlangalaleni.

header.title: Ukuhlola umsebenzi wamanje noma ukuqala iphrojekthi eqondile

paragraphs: Sebenzisa i-registry ukuze ubone ukuthi yini esesidlangalaleni kakade, noma uqale ukungenisa uma inkinga ethile yokufinyeleleka kufanele ibe yiprojekthi.
